rawFiles.name: wikidata-geonames-enrichment-candidates-2026-07-08.json
rawFiles.notes: Generated by a Wikidata SPARQL query against existing GeoNames identifiers in the local data-automation output directory.

transforms: Query Wikidata for items whose GeoNames ID exactly matches an existing transport record externalIds.geonames value.
Accept only existing canonical records with exact GeoNames ID matches and compatible public transport identity.
Add Wikidata IDs and dated source references to accepted records.
Do not replace canonical coordinates, names, location types, or operational status from Wikidata.
reviewNotes: Imported 2 Wikidata identifier enrichments from exact GeoNames ID matches: Tartus port (Q21591617) and Nasib Border Crossing (Q13576098). No new location records were added.
